name: create_entry
description: Create a new content entry for a specific content type in Strapi. The request body must contain a 'data' object with field values matching the content type schema. Relations can be set by providing the related entry's ID or an array of IDs. The entry is created as a draft unless 'publishedAt' is explicitly set to a date string. Returns the newly created entry with its generated ID.

parameters.name: content_type
parameters.description: The pluralized API name of the content type (e.g., 'articles', 'products').

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The content entry data object. Keys must match the field names defined in the content type schema. For relation fields, use the related entry's numeric ID or an array of IDs. Set 'publishedAt' to a date string to publish immediately, or omit it to save as draft.

data.title: Getting Started with Strapi
data.content: Strapi is an open-source headless CMS that makes it easy to manage your content and distribute it anywhere.

attributes.title: Getting Started with Strapi
attributes.content: Strapi is an open-source headless CMS that makes it easy to manage your content and distribute it anywhere.
